About Us

  • Home
  • About
Our Story

How It All Started

Solutions Squad was born in the summer of 2019 when a group of coworkers decided they needed a reason to leave the office before sunset. We signed up for the Bloomington Recreational Softball League on a whim, bought matching shirts from a craft store, and promptly lost our first three games.

Fast forward six seasons and we've got a bona fide team culture, a championship banner (2022 — still going strong), and a tradition of post-game hangouts that might be the real reason everyone keeps coming back.

We welcome new players every season. If you can catch, hit, or at least run in the right direction, you've got a spot on the squad.

Meet the Team Join the Squad

What We're About

Compete Hard

We take the game seriously enough to want to win, but not so seriously that we forget to have fun. Every pitch, every at-bat, every inning counts.

Stay Welcoming

All skill levels are welcome. Whether you played in college or this is your first time holding a bat, there's a place for you on this team.

Community First

This team is more than softball. It's a community of people who show up for each other — on game day and off it. That's the real win.

Get in Touch

Want to join, follow along, or just say hi? We'd love to hear from you.

  • solutionssquad@example.com
  • Bloomington, IN
  • @SolutionsSquadSoftball
  • @solutionssquad
Interested in Joining?

We open the roster each spring before the season starts. Drop us an email with your name, experience level, and preferred position. All are welcome!

Send Us a Message

SOLUTIONS SQUAD

A casual co-ed softball team bringing competitive spirit and good times to the Bloomington recreational league since 2019. Come out and cheer us on!
